title: constrained two-pulse template fit for S07d injected target
followup_tickets: S11d: fit the S07d injected target with asymmetric amplitude-binned templates and pre-register secondary-fraction thresholds; expected information gain: tests whether template mismatch, not ML capacity, explains the remaining RF advantage.

P05b: calibrate CNN or MLP two-pulse abstention on S07d-style run-held-out injections using chi2/ndf and secondary-amplitude sidebands; expected information gain: turns high-AUC detection into an operational recovery rule.
